title: Vacancies on board
doc_html:
§965.  Vacancies on board

Vacancies occurring on the board shall be filled, for unexpired terms, by the governor according to the procedure provided in R.S. 37:962.
doc_text:
§965.  Vacancies on board
Vacancies occurring on the board shall be filled, for unexpired terms, by the governor according to the procedure provided in R.S. 37:962.
